title: Zelenskyy urges Trump to see through Russia’s ‘games’
description: In an FT interview, Ukraine’s president says conflict at ‘beginning of the end’ because both sides need a ceasefire
content: In an FT interview, Ukraine’s president says conflict at ‘beginning of the end’ because both sides need a ceasefire
